name: Shady Grove Orthopedic Associates, P.A. v. Allstate Insurance Co.
question:
1) Can a state legislature prohibit federal courts from using a federal class action rule for a state law claim?

2) Can a state legislature dictate civil procedure in federal courts?
description: A case in which the Court held that Section 901(b) of the New York Rules of Civil Procedure does not preclude a federal court ruling on entities from different jurisdictions from hearing a class action under Rule 23 of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure.
